memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string name, string str=defaultValue, WaveTextOrNull wvText=defaultValue, variable overwrite=defaultValue, variable compressionMode=defaultValue, variable skipIfExists=defaultValue, variable writeIgorAttr=defaultValue, variable appendData=defaultValue, variable refMode=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: H5_WriteTextDataset

briefdescription.para: Write a string or text wave into a HDF5 dataset.

detaileddescription.para:
locationID
HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
name
Name of the HDF5 dataset
str
Contents to write into the dataset
wvText
Contents to write into the dataset
overwrite
[optional, defaults to false] Should existing datasets be overwritten
compressionMode
[optional, defaults to NO_COMPRESSION] Type of compression to use, one of CompressionMode
skipIfExists
[optional, defaults to false] Do nothing if the dataset already exists
writeIgorAttr
[optional, defaults to false] Add Igor specific attributes to the dataset, see the /IGOR flag of HDF5SaveData
appendData
[optional, defaults to -1] Set the dimension to append to within the given dataset (requires compression)
refMode
[optional, defaults to NO_REFERENCE] Set refMode, one in ReferenceMode (DisplayHelpTopic "Saving Reference Data")
Only one of str or wvText can be given.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string name, variable var=defaultValue, variable varType=defaultValue, WaveOrNull wv=defaultValue, variable overwrite=defaultValue, variable compressionMode=defaultValue, variable skipIfExists=defaultValue, variable writeIgorAttr=defaultValue, variable appendData=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: H5_WriteDataset

briefdescription.para: Write a variable or text wave into a HDF5 dataset.

detaileddescription.para:
locationID
HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
name
Name of the HDF5 dataset
var
Contents to write into the dataset
varType
Type of the data, must be given if var is supplied. See IgorTypes
wv
Contents to write into the dataset
overwrite
[optional, defaults to false] Should existing datasets be overwritten
compressionMode
[optional, defaults to NO_COMPRESSION] Type of compression to use, one of CompressionMode
skipIfExists
[optional, defaults to false] Do nothing if the dataset already exists
writeIgorAttr
[optional, defaults to false] Add Igor specific attributes to the dataset, see the /IGOR flag of HDF5SaveData
appendData
[optional, defaults to -1] Set the dimension to append to within the given dataset (requires compression)
Only one of var or wv can be given.

briefdescription.para: Return a wave for the valid chunk sizes of each dimension taking into account the compression mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string name, wave wv, variable overwrite, variable compressionMode, variable skipIfExists, variable writeIgorAttr, variable appendData, variable refMode)
memberdef.name: H5_WriteDatasetLowLevel

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string attrName, string path, string list=defaultValue, string str=defaultValue, variable overwrite=defaultValue, variable refMode=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: H5_WriteTextAttribute

briefdescription.para: Attach a text attribute to the given location.

detaileddescription.para:
locationID
HDF5 identifier, can be a file, group or dataset
attrName
Name of the attribute
path
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the object onto which the attribute should be attached.
list
Contents to write into the attribute, list will be always written as 1D-array
str
Contents to write into the attribute
overwrite
[optional, defaults to false] Should existing attributes be overwritten
refMode
[optional, defaults to 0] Set refMode, one in ReferenceMode (DisplayHelpTopic "Saving Reference Data")
Only one of str or list can be given.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string attrName, string path, variable var, variable varType, variable overwrite=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: H5_WriteAttribute

briefdescription.para: Attach a numerical attribute to the given location.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file, group or dataset
Name of the attribute
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the object onto which the attribute should be attached.
Contents to write into the attribute
Type of the attribute, see IgorTypes
[optional, defaults to false] Should existing attributes be overwritten

briefdescription.para: Create a link to a group.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file, group or dataset
Name of the link
The linked destination

briefdescription.para: Open HDF5 file and return ID.

parameterdescription.para: full path to nwb file
open file for writing. default is readonly.

simplesect.para: ID for referencing open hdf5 file

briefdescription.para: Close HDF5 file.

parameterdescription.para: ID of open hdf5 file

briefdescription.para: Return 1 if the given HDF5 file is already open, 0 otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 locationID from HDF5OpenFile.

briefdescription.para: Return 1 if the given HDF5 dataset exists, 0 otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the dataset

briefdescription.para: Load a specified dataset as wave.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
path on top of locationID which identifies the dataset

simplesect.para: reference to wave containing loaded data

briefdescription.para: Return the dimension sizes of the given dataset.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
name of the dataset

simplesect.para: wave with the dimension sizes or an invalid wave reference

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string path, string attribute, variable *objectType=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: H5_AttributeExists

briefdescription.para: Check if a given attribute exists.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group or dataset
Name of the attribute
[optional] Return the type of the element to which the attribute is attached to. Can be used for subsequent HDF5LoadData calls.

briefdescription.para: Load the given attribute and return its contents.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group or dataset
Name of the attribute to load

briefdescription.para: Return 1 if the given HDF5 group exists, 0 otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group.

briefdescription.para: Create all groups along the given path.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group

briefdescription.para: Return true if name is a valid hdf5 identifier.

detaileddescription.para: This is more restrictive than the actual HDF5 library checks. See the BNF Grammar here.

briefdescription.para: List all datasets at path (non-recursively)

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group

briefdescription.para: List all groups inside a group (non-recursively)

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 file identifier
Full path to the group inside fileID

briefdescription.para: Open the group reachable via locationID and path and return its ID.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group

simplesect.para: the groupID of the opened group. Return NaN if the group did not exist.

briefdescription.para: Flush the file contents to disc.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 file identifier

xrefdescription.para: Needs HDF5 XOP support for reading link targets use HDF5LinkInfo

briefdescription.para: Return the HDF5 Library version.
H5 Wrapper functions for convenient use of the HDF5 operations
